rows.note: numeric profile `tassadar.numeric_profile.f32_only.v1` is routeable only as a named cpu-reference profile-specific lane
numeric profile `tassadar.numeric_profile.mixed_i32_f32.v1` is routeable only as a named cpu-reference profile-specific lane
numeric profile `tassadar.numeric_profile.bounded_f64_conversion.v1` stays suppressed because the float-profile gate does not allow public route promotion

claim_boundary: this router report names exact float-enabled numeric profiles as profile-specific cpu-reference routes only when the dedicated float-profile gate is green. It keeps approximate f64 narrowing suppressed and does not widen any numeric profile into the default served route
summary: Float profile route policy now records promoted_profile_specific_routes=2, suppressed_routes=1.
